data-bf42b6aa81aba7736a3e3160f7d44fae.answer: it increases the lifespan/useable lifespan of the product (e.g. new battery, new screen, new camera) for reasonable prices and without the risk of losing new functionality - smartwatch and smartphone manemfacturers tend to give new functionality only to new products and it slows down.
